pageTitle: Tell us if you need support
heading: Tell us if you need support
askingForReasonableAdjustmentParagraph1: Some people need support to access information and use our services. We call this a reasonable adjustment.
askingForReasonableAdjustmentParagraph2: Some examples of reasonable adjustments are:
askingForReasonableAdjustmentListItem2: bringing support with you to the hearing, like an assistance dog
askingForReasonableAdjustmentlistItem3: documents in an alternative format, like large print
askingForReasonableAdjustmentListItem4: regular breaks during a hearing to make you feel more comfortable
askingForReasonableAdjustmentParagraph3: You can ask for a reasonable adjustment now by selecting ‘Continue to the questions’, or at any time during your case by selecting ‘Your support’ from your case overview.
askingForReasonableAdjustmentParagraph4: Once you’ve submitted your request for support, it’ll be reviewed by the court or a judge. We’ll keep you updated on the status of the request in your account. If we need more information we’ll contact you by the preferred method you’ve already chosen.
askingForSomethingElseParagraph1: You must contact the court directly to ask for something else for you or someone else who’s coming to court to support you.
askingForSomethingElseListItem1: communication and documents in Welsh or to speak Welsh at your hearing
askingForSomethingElseListItem3: special measures, like giving evidence in private, because you’re vulnerable
askingForSomethingElseParagraph3: You can contact the court by email or telephone. You can also visit the court and speak to someone directly.
contactByEmailParagraph1LinkText: find a court or tribunal service (opens in new tab)
contactByEmailParagraph1Suffix: to get your local court’s email address.
contactByEmailParagraph2: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
contactByPhoneParagraph3: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab).
progressButton: I do not need support at this time
